announcements.title: Scheduled Maintenance - Database Servers
announcements.content: We will be performing scheduled maintenance on our primary database servers this Saturday from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM EST. During this time, some services may experience intermittent connectivity issues. Please plan accordingly and save your work before the maintenance window.
announcements.author: IT Infrastructure Team

announcements.title: Security Update Required
announcements.content: All employees must update their passwords by end of week. Our security audit has identified that passwords older than 90 days need to be refreshed. Please visit the password management portal to update your credentials.
announcements.author: Security Team

announcements.title: New Collaboration Tool Available
announcements.content: We're excited to announce the rollout of our new team collaboration platform. This tool integrates with existing systems and provides enhanced features for project management and team communication. Training sessions will be held next week.
announcements.author: IT Operations

announcements.title: CRITICAL: Email Service Disruption
announcements.content: We are currently experiencing issues with our email gateway. Some emails may be delayed or not delivered. Our team is working on resolving this issue urgently. Please use alternative communication channels for urgent matters.
announcements.author: Network Operations Center

tools.name: GitLab
tools.description: Source code management and CI/CD pipeline
